---
title: "Society of All Saints’s Sisters of the Poor, The"
---

## Society of All Saints’s Sisters of the Poor, The

**Type:** organization

### About

This sisterhood was founded in London in 1851 by Harriet Brownlow Byron, with the support of the Rev. Upton Richards.  See http://orders.anglican.org/arcyb/assp.html

### Letters Mentioning This Organization


---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
